text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Hey, did you see Narita Brian's announcement?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I did! That's why I decided to come watch the
Hanshin Daishoten! After all...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
"If she doesn't keep winning after this race, her
announcement is meaningless."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her announcement at yesterday's award
ceremony was covered by the media and
broadcast around the world.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No matter who I'm up against or what kind of race
I'm in, I'll tear the track to shreds!
